message:
test(search-core): add 17 tests for index layout and checkpoints

Expand index_layout.rs from 12 to 29 tests covering:
- SchemaHash: serde roundtrip, HashSet dedup, empty fields
  (produces 64-char hex), hex validation, Debug trait, short()
  on input shorter than 12 chars
- IndexScope: serde all variants, Hash distinct for 3 variants
- IndexLayout: root() accessor, global scope paths, product scope
  paths, Debug and Clone traits
- IndexCheckpoint: FILENAME constant, overwrite writes new data,
  file is pretty-printed JSON with newlines
- activate: semantic engine type works
- SchemaField: not-indexed field (indexed: false)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
